name: The Pit
short_description: Fight challenging bosses where you can evade each attack with a unique dodge while building up powerful combos. In a game that tests your reaction speed while making you feel untouchable.
detailed_description:
Become the immortal and fight extremely challenging bosses. Hone your skills and master the ability to dodge every attack, while defeating enemies without receiving a single hit.



Use simple controls to dodge and counter and build up your dodge counter with every successful dodge.
The more successful dodges you perform the stronger your attacks get and the longer your counter combo becomes.

Features:

  • Simple Dodge: Simplifying the ability to dodge every attack to a single button.

  • Unique Dodge Animation: Having a completely different dodge animation for each attack type for more cool looking poses.

  • New Game+: Bosses gain new attack patterns, better reaction times and new weapon designs with every new game. Further testing your abilities each time.

  • One-Shot Camera: Never have to lose focus and being fully immersed without a single camera cut from start to finish.

  • Realistic Graphics: Enjoy the amazing graphics complimented by the enthralling soundtrack.

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Japanese
